SELECT 
    cc.name AS 'Centre hospitalière',
    rpse.name AS Service,
    p.numero AS Numero,
    p.name AS 'Nom et prénom',
    IF(p.gender = 2, 'Masculin', 'Féminin') AS Sexe,
    p.age AS Age,
    CASE p.age_unity
        WHEN 0 THEN 'Jour'
        WHEN 1 THEN 'Mois'
        WHEN 2 THEN 'Ans'
    END AS 'Unite d\'age',
    c.name AS Commune,
    f.name AS fokontany,
    rpst.name AS 'Statut PEC',
    ccr.name AS 'Centre transferant',
    rpe.motif AS 'Motif d\'entree',
    rps.diagnosticFinal AS 'Diagnostic final',
    rpts.name AS 'Type de sortie',
    DATE(rpc.dateEntree) AS 'Date d\'entrée controle',
    DATE(rpc.dateSortie) AS 'Date de sortie controle',
    rpc.numero AS 'Numero controle',
    rpc.description AS 'Description controle',
    rpc.dateSuiviControle AS 'Date suivi controle',
    r.observation AS 'Observation',
    rpe.info_medicale AS 'Information medicale'
FROM
    register AS r
        LEFT JOIN
    patient AS p ON p.id = r.patient_id
        LEFT JOIN
    fokontany AS f ON p.fokontany_id = f.id
        LEFT JOIN
    commune AS c ON f.commune_id = c.id
        LEFT JOIN
    register_pec_entry AS rpe ON rpe.register_id = r.id
        LEFT JOIN
    register_pec_sortie AS rps ON rps.register_id = r.id
        LEFT JOIN
    register_pec_type_sortie AS rpts ON rpts.id = rps.type_sortie_id
        LEFT JOIN
    register_pec_service AS rpse ON rpse.id = rpe.service_id
        LEFT JOIN
    register_pec_statut AS rpst ON rpst.id = rpe.statut_id
        LEFT JOIN
    care_center_projet AS ccp ON r.care_center_projet_id = ccp.id
        LEFT JOIN
    projet AS pr ON ccp.projet_id = pr.id
        LEFT JOIN
    program AS pg ON pg.id = pr.program_id
        LEFT JOIN
    care_center AS cc ON ccp.care_center_id = cc.id
        LEFT JOIN
    chrd AS ch ON ch.care_center_id = cc.id
        LEFT JOIN
    district AS d ON d.id = ch.district_id
        LEFT JOIN
    register_pec_reference AS rpr ON rpr.entry_id = rpe.id
        LEFT JOIN
    care_center AS ccr ON rpr.care_center_transferant_id = ccr.id
        LEFT JOIN
    register_pec_controle AS rpc ON rpc.sortie_id = rps.id
WHERE
    pr.name LIKE 'Couverture médicale CHRD'
     AND YEAR(rpc.dateEntree) = YEAR(CURRENT_DATE)
	 AND MONTH(rpc.dateEntree) = MONTH(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
     and cc.name = 'Ifanadiana'
ORDER BY rpc.dateEntree ASC
